nasb.text: “Speak to Aaron and to his sons, saying, ‘Thus you shall bless the sons of Israel. You shall say to them:

esv.text: “Speak to Aaron and his sons, saying, Thus you shall bless the people of Israel: you shall say to them,

cnv.text: “你要告訴亞倫和他的兒子說：‘你們要這樣為以色列人祝福，對他們說：

ccb.text: “你告诉亚伦父子们要这样为以色列人祝福，
